Jan 03, 2024  20:56</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Miranda Devine: “In Michigan, 500 mules averaged 50 drop box visits, at five ballots per drop, giving you 125,000 suspect votes…In Wisconsin, 100 mules averaged 28 drop box visits each, which gives us 14,000 suspect votes…in Georgia, where 250 mules averaged 24 drop box visits each, we get 30,000 suspect votes, more than enough to overcome Biden’s 12,000 vote advantage. D’Souza moves Georgia’s 16 electoral votes into the Trump column. In Arizona, 200 mules averaging 20 drop box visits makes 20,000 suspect votes, giving another 11 hypothetical electoral votes to Trump. In Philadelphia alone, 1,100 mules averaged 50 drop box visits giving us 275,000 suspect votes which would flip the Pennsylvania result to Trump, giving him another 20 electoral votes. ‘Shockingly, even this narrow way of looking at just our 2,000 mules in these swing states gives Trump the win with 279 electoral votes to Biden’s 259,’ says D’Souza.” https://nypost.com/2022/04/24/biden-is-up-to-old-election-tricks/</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_111694012395833178" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/111694012395833178" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B3F72" data-theme="elections" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2024  20:56</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Public Interest Legal Foundation: “2020 Election: 90.6 million ballots sent, 1.1 million undeliverable, 560,814 rejected, 14.7 million ‘unknown’…In some places, it can be difficult to understand how large these numbers really are. Jan 04, 2024  15:35</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Kyle Becker, Becker News: “An Election Integrity review conducted on 92 court challenges filed over the 2020 election found that a clear majority of the cases decided on the merits were ruled favorably for the plaintiffs; particularly, the Republican Party and the Trump campaign…‘You’re gonna wanna bookmark this,’ remarked Arizona Sun Times reporter @ Rach_IC. ‘This is a compilation of all of the 2020 election challenges and what became of them. Despite the MSM lies that 60+ election challenges found no evidence of wrongdoing, there were actually 92 cases, with only 30 decided on the merits, and of those 30, Trump and/or the GOP plaintiff prevailed in 22 of them’…many states have since decided that 2020 election practices such as the inclusion of privately funded ‘Zuckerboxes’ were either illegal or were subsequently outlawed…Thus debunks a widespread narrative: Trump’s legal challenges to the 2020 election were all ‘baseless.’”</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_111698414419516823" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/111698414419516823" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2024  15:37</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">“Americans who track the Hunter Biden laptop saga by wide margins say the FBI misled the public with claims about Russian disinformation, and that the 2020 election may have played out differently had the story not been suppressed…More than two thirds of respondents also said that the FBI and the intelligence community deliberately misled the public by urging Facebook and Twitter to stop spreading such stories…An even wider margin—more than three quarters of respondents—said any collusion between senior Democrats, the FBI, intelligence chiefs and the Biden campaign on suppressing the story would have denied voters access to critical information in the run-up to the election. Another half of respondents said they would have voted differently had they known the Hunter Biden’s laptop revelations were authentic…Finally, a wide margin of respondents—71 percent—said a truthful interpretation of the Hunter Biden laptop issue could have swung the November 3 election…”https://www.dailymail.co.uk/news/article-11529381/Hunter-Bidens-laptop-Voters-lacked-critical-information-2020-election-survey-shows.html</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_111698420874993411" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/111698420874993411" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B3F72" data-theme="elections" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2024  15:39</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">“Tenney’s discovery that only 10 percent of CTCL’s funding went to right-leaning counties confirms earlier allegations that CTCL used these private funds, which were provided by Big Tech billionaire Mark Zuckerberg, to selectively drive turnout in Democratic areas. These funds bypassed state and local governments and went directly to local election agencies.” https://tenney.house.gov/media/press-releases/new-information-confirms-zuckerberg-connected-group-funneled-majority-election</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_111698429092894237" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/111698429092894237" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B3F72" data-theme="elections" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2024  15:42</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">“In a resounding vindication, TTV successfully defended its actions of December 2020, aiding Georgia citizens in filing elector challenges based on data showing over 364,000 voters appeared to be ineligible to vote due to change in residency. Jan 04, 2024  15:49</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Vanity Fair: “In the last week you have gone from living a pretty private life to being very much in the public eye. What has that been like?”E. Jean Carroll: “Fabulous. Buoyant. It’s almost merry…As I was talking to somebody on the phone yesterday, a man just stood in front of me bowing as I talked on the phone. It was amazing. It was like he was standing in front of Queen Elizabeth.”</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_111698468981731044" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/111698468981731044" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2024  15:50</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Vanity Fair: “In the book you call yourself a hideous woman.”E. Jean Carroll: “Oh. I was bad, bad.”Vanity Fair: “Because you flashed a professor.”E. Jean Carroll: “He was the most popular professor on campus. So adorable. He went on to Washington to become quite a big deal. He was the golden boy. He was in Ballantine Hall lecturing. Ballantine Hall is the largest auditorium campus at the time. I had the temerity to walk on the stage in a trench coat and dark glasses, open my trench coat wearing a bright yellow bikini, and flash that man four, five, six seconds. He could barely stand up. Now, if a man did that today to a female professor, I hope that man would be in jail. So I put myself on the hideous list. He married a friend of mine…”Vanity Fair: “Did you feel guilty looking back on that later?”E. Jean Carroll: “No. I laugh my ass off about that…It was great.”</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_111698473423844348" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/111698473423844348" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2024  15:51</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Vanity Fair: “You also confessed to sexually harassing Roger Ailes while you had a show on his cable channel America’s Talking. He is also on your list of hideous men, but was once a friend.”E. Jean Carroll: “Oh, I did it. Every day I had a chance. I call him the pearl of his sex. Right on the air. I roll up my trouser legs. I would wait for the camera to come over. Then I would slowly pull up the right and then the left trouser leg. It would say Roger Ailes. I would say, ‘He’s my future husband.’ It never stopped. I’d ask him to twirl for me. I adored him.”</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_111698476054496739" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/111698476054496739" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2024  15:52</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Vanity Fair: “What makes a hideous woman, as opposed to a hideous man, or is there no difference?”E. Jean Carroll: “No, I don’t think there’s a difference. If you’re a hideous woman, you’re a hideous woman. What I did was wrong. Hideous women are hideous.”</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_111698478522153575" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/111698478522153575" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2024  15:54</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text"></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_111698488721433698" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/111698488721433698" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2024  15:59</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">E. Jean Carroll, “Hunter: The Strange and Savage Life of Hunter S. Thompson”: “Gonzo, now into his third Scotch, suddenly asked the girl if she would like to be raped. ‘You’ll like it,’ he said. ‘You have that look about you. I always recognize it immediately. You can see it in the eyes. It’s a fearful look.’ The girl giggled but declined. ‘Why use violence?’ she purred. ‘Can’t we just fuck normally?’ ‘Normally?’ he shouted. ‘What the hell does that mean? Are you some sort of weird freak? I want to rip off your clothes, rape you, tear you limb from limb, and throw you into the street. You’ll like it. Believe me, goddamn it. I’m an expert. He should have recused himself long ago! https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/opinion/carroll-v-trump-the-rape-case-that-started-at-a-resistance-party</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_111700712207748893" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/111700712207748893" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 05, 2024  01:25</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Vanity Fair wrote, “The ‘E’ in ‘E. Jean’ stands for Elizabeth, a name she gave herself after growing up as Betty Jean. She lives in a cabin she calls ‘the Mouse House,’ surrounded by trees with trunks she’s painted a striking shade of pale blue. When she embarks on her road trip, in a Prius named Miss Bingley, she leaves behind her cat, Vagina T. Fireball.”</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_111700734660241985" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/111700734660241985" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 05, 2024  01:26</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">The National Pulse: “Other Facebook posts uncovered by The National Pulse shed further light on the mind of Trump’s accuser. Carroll, who penned an advice column for Elle magazine, posed questions for her audience including: ‘Big Dick Energy: Obama’s got it. Putin’s got it. Maxine Waters’s got it. Who’s on YOUR Big Dick Energy List?’ And ‘Let’s play Boff/Marry/Strangle. I’ll start: Ryan Seacrest, Dick Cheney, Steve Jobs. (And yes I KNOW the game is really called F/M/K)’.”</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_111700738020229403" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/111700738020229403" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 05, 2024  01:26</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Vanity Fair: “In the last week you have gone from living a pretty private life to being very much in the public eye. What has that been like?”E. Jean Carroll: “Fabulous. Buoyant. It’s almost merry…As I was talking to somebody on the phone yesterday, a man just stood in front of me bowing as I talked on the phone. It was amazing. It was like he was standing in front of Queen Elizabeth.”</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_111700738947912751" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/111700738947912751" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 05, 2024  01:27</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Vanity Fair: “In the book you call yourself a hideous woman.”E. Jean Carroll: “Oh. I was bad, bad.”Vanity Fair: “Because you flashed a professor.”E. Jean Carroll: “He was the most popular professor on campus. So adorable. He went on to Washington to become quite a big deal. He was the golden boy. He was in Ballantine Hall lecturing. Ballantine Hall is the largest auditorium campus at the time. I had the temerity to walk on the stage in a trench coat and dark glasses, open my trench coat wearing a bright yellow bikini, and flash that man four, five, six seconds. He could barely stand up. Now, if a man did that today to a female professor, I hope that man would be in jail. So I put myself on the hideous list. He married a friend of mine…”Vanity Fair: “Did you feel guilty looking back on that later?”E. Jean Carroll: “No. I laugh my ass off about that…It was great.”</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_111700741350040303" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/111700741350040303" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 05, 2024  01:27</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Vanity Fair: “You also confessed to sexually harassing Roger Ailes while you had a show on his cable channel America’s Talking. He is also on your list of hideous men, but was once a friend.”E. Jean Carroll: “Oh, I did it. Every day I had a chance. I call him the pearl of his sex. Right on the air. I roll up my trouser legs. I would wait for the camera to come over. Then I would slowly pull up the right and then the left trouser leg. It would say Roger Ailes. I would say, ‘He’s my future husband.’ It never stopped. I’d ask him to twirl for me. I adored him.”</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_111700742554940237" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/111700742554940237" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 05, 2024  01:28</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Vanity Fair: “What makes a hideous woman, as opposed to a hideous man, or is there no difference?”E. Jean Carroll: “No, I don’t think there’s a difference. If you’re a hideous woman, you’re a hideous woman. What I did was wrong. Hideous women are hideous.”</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_111700744727737978" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/111700744727737978" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 05, 2024  01:33</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Q: “At what point did you decide to file a lawsuit against the defendant?”A: “Well, wherever I went after the story, people said, ‘Are you going to sue him? Are you going to sue him?’ and I would say, ‘No, no, no, not going to do it. I’m just not.’ And then I had a conversation with someone who knew the ins and outs, an actual lawyer, and he said, ‘You should really seriously think about this.’”Q: “Who was that lawyer without getting into the conversation?”A: “George Conway.”Q: “How did you meet George Conway?”A: “Met him at a party at Molly Jong-Fast’s house.”Q: “Was he your lawyer at the time?”A: “No, no, no, no.”Q: “So after you spoke to George, did you retain counsel?”A: “Yes.”Q: “How soon after?”A: “The day after. The day — two days later.”Q: “Did George recommend Ms. Kaplan?”A: “Yes, he did.”</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_111700764981316680" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/111700764981316680" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 05, 2024  01:35</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Byron York: “Tech billionaire Reid Hoffman is bankrolling Carroll’s case. Like so many others involved on Carroll’s side, Hoffman is profoundly anti-Trump. He is also not afraid to push the envelope of anti-Trumpism; in 2018, he apologized for funding a group that secretly imitated Russian disinformation tactics in an attempt to benefit the Democrat in Alabama’s special election for the U.S. Senate. Hoffman’s $$ has made some waves in the Carroll case because, in her Oct 2022 deposition, Carroll denied that anyone was paying her legal fees. Here is what Carroll said: Q: Are you presently paying your counsel’s fees? A: This is a contingency case. Q: So you’re not paying expenses or anything out of pocket to date. Is that correct? A: I’m not sure about expenses. I have to look that up. Q: Is anyone else paying your legal fees, Ms. Carroll? A: No. As the trial approached, Kaplan, Carroll’s lawyer, wrote to the Trump legal team to admit that what Carroll said was not true.”</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_111700771966164155" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/111700771966164155" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 05, 2024  01:36</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Breitbart: “‘Reid Hoffman, the co-founder of LinkedIn and a harsh critic of former President Donald J. Trump, has helped pay for a lawsuit by E. Jean Carroll, the New York magazine writer who sued Mr. Trump for rape and defamation, according to newly filed court papers in the case,’ the New York Times reported this month. Hoffman’s disdain for Trump is no secret, either. He said in a recent interview that he would ‘spend as much as I possibly can and it takes and is effective [to beat Trump].’ Hoffman’s chief political adviser Dmitri Mehlhorn also identified their goal as ‘weakening the political power of the anti-American Trump-MAGA movement.’ ‘Our political philanthropy is focused on weakening the political power of the anti-American Trump-MAGA movement,’ he said last year, per CNBC. ‘Far left groups, such as the Justice Democrats, help the MAGA movement by attacking centrist Democrats who can win general elections.’”</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_111700778442698902" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/111700778442698902" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 05, 2024  01:46</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">E. Such disrespect for an Appeals Court, the job of which is to protect New Yorkers from runaway Judges like Engoron, is unheard of in our Country, and smacks of Banana Republic tactics employed by Crooked Joe Biden’s other Henchmen, including Deranged Jack Smith.
